author: doll-agent
content: Implemented fft_into / ifft_into in ferray-fft/src/complex.rs and rfft_into / irfft_into in ferray-fft/src/real.rs. Tests in both modules cover round-trip equality with the allocating versions plus the shape-mismatch error path; ferray-fft cargo test all green, clippy clean. N-D variants can land in a follow-up if a caller needs them; 1-D was the motivating case.
